title: Verify Engagement section shows content based on consumption threshold
description: Test that content recommendation logic works for pre and post 90% consumption
preconditions: User is on Trial Corner with active trial

steps.description: 1. Check Engagement section with less than 90% content consumed

expected_result: Pre-90%: Shows acquired content for continuation. Post-90%: Shows top 1 content in similar genre with trailer autoplay option
